title: excoecaria biglandulosa var. pallida
intro: Excoecaria biglandulosa var. pallida is a variety of the Excoecaria biglandulosa plant, commonly known as the yellow oleander, a plant native to tropical regions of Asia. This plant has been used in traditional medicine for its medicinal properties, which include anti-inflammatory, antimicrobial, and antiviral properties. The health benefits of Excoecaria biglandulosa var. pallida include treating fever, skin infections, and respiratory issues, as well as having antioxidant and anti-cancer properties. In herbal preparations, the leaves and bark of this plant are often used to make teas, infusions, and extracts, which are used to treat various health conditions.
